text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian has won the autumn Tenno Sho.
Though defeated, Matikanetannhauser is
motivated to strive for victory next time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, expectations grow for a sisterly
showdown with Biwa Hayahide, but her return to
racing looks doubtful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian does her best not to think of her
sister's injury, instead focusing on the Japan Cup.
